title: TravelerZ
description: Adds titles while traveling through biomes to show the average level of mobs as an addon for the nameplate mod
body:
[![ServerAtelier](https://www.serveratelier.com/assets/themes/atelier/assets/images/banner/sa_budget.png)](https://www.serveratelier.com/) ![Headline](https://i.imgur.com/JilSS8A.png)
[](https://discord.gg/cV4cJyGXqF) [](https://globox1997.github.io/wiki/mods/TravelerZ/) [](https://github.com/Globox1997/TravelerZ/issues)


An addon for the mod [Nameplate](https://modrinth.com/mod/nameplate) which adds titles on traveling through biomes including the average level of mobs. ![Showcase](https://i.imgur.com/MW3RPjw.png)

[](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) This mod is developed for Fabric. There are no plans to develop a Forge version. Modpack Permission: Feel free to use it in any modpacks. Bug Report: Just report bugs at the github page.
